item.title: D20 on a Bus Season 2 Teaser - Dimension 20
item.description:
Dragon Master Katie Marovitch is back! Get ready for another thrilling season of D20 on a Bus, premiering TONIGHT on Dropout at 7pm ET / 4pm PT!. FAQ here:https://www.dropout.tv/faq/d20-on-a-bus
